---
title: "Web GIS Flurordnung"
description: "A browser-based GIS for rural development built entirely on real, open geodata."
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [Web GIS, Leaflet, Geospatial]
---

## About

**FlurGIS** is a self-contained web-GIS prototype for rural development and land consolidation
(*Ländliche Entwicklung*), built entirely from **real, open geodata**. It shows official
basemaps (BKG TopPlusOpen, basemap.de) alongside OpenStreetMap, and pulls live thematic data —
land use, tracks, watercourses and the municipal boundary — from the **Overpass API**. Real
**ALKIS** cadastral parcels can be imported as GeoJSON (auto-reprojected EPSG:25832 → WGS84).

It offers an attribute table, filtering, area/length calculation in the official CRS, a
measuring tool, and GeoJSON/CSV export. A query tab combines live Overpass with a client-side
SQL/PostGIS emulation (`ST_Area`, `GROUP BY`). Example area: the municipality of Rudelzhausen
(Hallertau, Bavaria). A small Python ETL prepares ALKIS data for a PostGIS backend in the
production scenario.

## Stack

[JavaScript]{.badge-skill} [Leaflet]{.badge-skill} [proj4js]{.badge-skill} [Overpass / OSM]{.badge-skill} [PostGIS]{.badge-skill} [Python (ETL)]{.badge-skill}
